[index-4.html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/26902442/index-4.html)
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="is">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Propads — Mini Legghlífar</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bebas+Neue&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root{--black:#0a0a0a;--gray-dark:#1a1a1a;--gray-mid:#2e2e2e;--gray:#888;--gray-light:#c8c8c8;--white:#f5f5f5;}
  *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
  html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
  body{background:var(--black);color:var(--white);font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-weight:300;cursor:none;}
  .cursor{width:10px;height:10px;background:white;border-radius:50%;position:fixed;pointer-events:none;z-index:9999;transition:width 0.2s,height 0.2s;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);}
  .cursor.big{width:40px;height:40px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15);border:1px solid white;}
  nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:24px 48px;z-index:100;background:rgba(10,10,10,0.95);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--gray-mid);}
  .logo{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:28px;letter-spacing:0.12em;color:white;text-decoration:none;}
  nav ul{list-style:none;display:flex;gap:28px;align-items:center;}
  nav a{color:var(--gray-light);text-decoration:none;font-size:13px;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;transition:color 0.2s;}
  nav a:hover{color:white;}
  .cart-btn{background:white;color:black;border:none;padding:10px 20px;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;cursor:none;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-weight:500;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;transition:background 0.2s;}
  .cart-btn:hover{background:var(--gray-light);}
  .cart-badge{background:black;color:white;border-radius:50%;width:18px;height:18px;font-size:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:700;}
  .hero{height:100vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:flex-end;padding:0 48px 64px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
  .hero-bg{position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#111 0%,#0a0a0a 60%,#1a1a1a 100%);}
  .hero-grid{position:absolute;inset:0;background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.03) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.03) 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:60px 60px;}
  .hero-number{position:absolute;right:48px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(200px,28vw,380px);color:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);line-height:1;user-select:none;}
  .hero-content{position:relative;z-index:2;max-width:700px;}
  h1{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(72px,10vw,140px);line-height:0.92;letter-spacing:0.02em;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:24px;}
  .hero-sub{font-size:15px;color:var(--gray);line-height:1.6;max-width:380px;margin-bottom:40px;}
  .btn-primary{background:white;color:black;padding:16px 40px;font-size:13px;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;border:none;cursor:none;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-weight:500;transition:background 0.2s;display:inline-block;text-decoration:none;}
  .btn-primary:hover{background:var(--gray-light);}
  .scroll-hint{position:absolute;bottom:32px;right:48px;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:0.15em;color:var(--gray);text-transform:uppercase;writing-mode:vertical-rl;animation:pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;}
  @keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:0.3}50%{opacity:1}}
  section{padding:120px 48px;}
  .section-label{font-size:11px;letter-spacing:0.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gray);margin-bottom:64px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;}
  .section-label::after{content:'';flex:1;height:1px;background:var(--gray-mid);}
  h2{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(48px,7vw,96px);line-height:0.95;letter-spacing:0.02em;margin-bottom:48px;}
  .color-tabs{display:flex;margin-bottom:48px;border:1px solid var(--gray-mid);width:fit-content;}
  .color-tab{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:14px 28px;background:transparent;color:var(--gray);font-size:13px;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;cursor:none;transition:all 0.2s;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-weight:500;border:none;}
  .color-tab+.color-tab{border-left:1px solid var(--gray-mid);}
  .color-tab.blue-tab.active{background:#0d2a3d;color:#a8d4f0;}
  .color-tab.pink-tab.active{background:#3a0d1e;color:#f0a8be;}
  .color-dot{width:14px;height:14px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;}
  .color-dot.blue{background:#6ab0de;}
  .color-dot.pink{background:#d95a80;}
  .product-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:2px;}
  .product-card{background:var(--gray-dark);position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:background 0.3s;}
  .product-card:hover{background:#222;}
  .product-img{width:100%;aspect-ratio:1/1;overflow:hidden;background:#111;position:relative;}
  .product-img img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center;transition:transform 0.5s ease;}
  .product-card:hover .product-img img{transform:scale(1.05);}
  .product-tag{position:absolute;top:14px;left:14px;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:0.15em;text-transform:uppercase;background:white;color:black;padding:4px 10px;z-index:2;}
  .product-info{padding:24px 28px 32px;}
  .product-name{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:30px;letter-spacing:0.05em;margin-bottom:6px;}
  .product-desc{font-size:13px;color:var(--gray);line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:24px;}
  .product-footer{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:12px;}
  .price{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:32px;}
  .add-btn{background:white;color:black;border:none;padding:14px 24px;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;cursor:none;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-weight:500;transition:background 0.2s,transform 0.1s;}
  .add-btn:hover{background:var(--gray-light);transform:translateY(-1px);}
  .cart-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.8);z-index:200;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity 0.3s;}
  .cart-overlay.open{opacity:1;pointer-events:all;}
  .cart-drawer{position:fixed;top:0;right:0;bottom:0;width:440px;background:var(--gray-dark);z-index:201;transform:translateX(100%);transition:transform 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);display:flex;flex-direction:column;}
  .cart-drawer.open{transform:translateX(0);}
  .cart-head{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:32px 32px 24px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--gray-mid);}
  .cart-title{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:36px;letter-spacing:0.05em;}
  .cart-x{background:none;border:1px solid var(--gray-mid);color:white;width:36px;height:36px;font-size:16px;cursor:none;transition:border-color 0.2s;}
  .cart-x:hover{border-color:white;}
  .cart-body{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:24px 32px;}
  .cart-empty-msg{text-align:center;color:var(--gray);font-size:14px;margin-top:48px;}
  .cart-item{display:flex;gap:14px;padding:16px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--gray-mid);}
  .cart-item-img{width:72px;height:72px;background:#222;flex-shrink:0;overflow:hidden;}
  .cart-item-img img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}
  .cart-item-info{flex:1;min-width:0;}
  .cart-item-name{font-size:14px;font-weight:500;margin-bottom:3px;}
  .cart-item-meta{font-size:12px;color:var(--gray);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:8px;}
  .cart-item-price{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:22px;}
  .cart-item-controls{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-top:8px;}
  .qty-btn{width:28px;height:28px;border:1px solid var(--gray-mid);background:transparent;color:white;font-size:16px;cursor:none;transition:border-color 0.2s;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;line-height:1;}
  .qty-btn:hover{border-color:white;}
  .qty-num{font-size:14px;min-width:20px;text-align:center;}
  .remove-btn{background:none;border:none;color:var(--gray);font-size:11px;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;cursor:none;margin-left:auto;transition:color 0.2s;}
  .remove-btn:hover{color:white;}
  .cart-foot{padding:24px 32px;border-top:1px solid var(--gray-mid);}
  .cart-subtotal{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:20px;}
  .cart-subtotal-label{font-size:13px;color:var(--gray);letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;}
  .cart-subtotal-val{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:36px;}
  #paypal-btn-container{margin-bottom:10px;}
  .checkout-note{text-align:center;font-size:11px;color:var(--gray);}
  #treystir{background:var(--black);}
  .athletes-intro{max-width:600px;margin-bottom:80px;}
  .athletes-intro p{font-size:16px;color:var(--gray-light);line-height:1.8;}
  .athletes-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:2px;}
  .athlete-card{background:var(--gray-dark);aspect-ratio:3/4;position:relative;overflow:hidden;cursor:none;}
  .athlete-placeholder{width:100%;height:100%;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:12px;}
  .athlete-icon{opacity:0.12;}
  .athlete-icon svg{width:48px;height:48px;}
  .athlete-hint{font-size:11px;letter-spacing:0.15em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gray);}
  .athlete-info{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;padding:20px 24px;background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(0,0,0,0.85) 0%,transparent 100%);}
  .athlete-name{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:28px;letter-spacing:0.05em;}
  .athlete-club{font-size:12px;color:var(--gray-light);letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:4px;}
  .quote-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:2px;margin-top:2px;}
  .quote-card{background:var(--gray-dark);padding:40px 32px;}
  .quote-mark{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:80px;color:var(--gray-mid);line-height:0.8;margin-bottom:16px;}
  .quote-text{font-size:15px;color:var(--gray-light);line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:24px;font-style:italic;}
  .quote-author{font-size:12px;color:var(--gray);letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;}
  #um-okkur{background:var(--gray-dark);}
  .about-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:80px;align-items:center;}
  .about-img{width:100%;aspect-ratio:1/1;object-fit:cover;}
  .about-text p{font-size:15px;color:var(--gray-light);line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:20px;}
  .stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:32px;margin-top:48px;}
  .stat-num{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:56px;color:white;}
  .stat-label{font-size:12px;color:var(--gray);letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;}
  #pantanir{background:var(--black);}
  .contact-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:80px;}
  .contact-info p{font-size:15px;color:var(--gray);line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:32px;}
  .contact-links{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:16px;}
  .contact-link{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;font-size:14px;color:var(--gray-light);text-decoration:none;padding-bottom:16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--gray-mid);transition:color 0.2s;}
  .contact-link:hover{color:white;}
  .contact-icon{width:40px;height:40px;border:1px solid var(--gray-mid);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:16px;}
  .form-group{margin-bottom:20px;}
  .form-group label{display:block;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:0.15em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gray);margin-bottom:8px;}
  .form-group input,.form-group textarea{width:100%;background:var(--gray-dark);border:1px solid var(--gray-mid);color:white;padding:14px 16px;font-size:14px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;outline:none;transition:border-color 0.2s;}
  .form-group input:focus,.form-group textarea:focus{border-color:white;}
  .form-group textarea{height:120px;resize:none;}
  footer{background:var(--gray-dark);padding:48px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;border-top:1px solid var(--gray-mid);}
  .footer-logo{font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;font-size:24px;letter-spacing:0.12em;}
  .footer-text{font-size:12px;color:var(--gray);}
  .toast{position:fixed;bottom:32px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(100px);background:white;color:black;padding:14px 28px;font-size:13px;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;z-index:600;transition:transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-weight:500;}
  .toast.show{transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0);}
  .fade-in{opacity:0;transform:translateY(30px);transition:opacity 0.7s ease,transform 0.7s ease;}
  .fade-in.visible{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}
  @media(max-width:900px){
    nav{padding:16px 24px;}
    section{padding:80px 24px;}
    .hero{padding:0 24px 48px;}
    .product-grid,.athletes-grid,.quote-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    .about-grid,.contact-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:40px;}
    .cart-drawer{width:100%;}
    footer{flex-direction:column;gap:16px;text-align:center;}
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="cursor" id="cursor"></div>

<nav>
  <a href="#" class="logo">Propads</a>
  <ul>
    <li><a href="#vorur">Vörur</a></li>
    <li><a href="#treystir">Leikmenn</a></li>
    <li><a href="#um-okkur">Um okkur</a></li>
    <li><a href="#pantanir">Samband</a></li>
    <li><button class="cart-btn" onclick="openCart()">Karfa <span class="cart-badge" id="cartBadge">0</span></button></li>
  </ul>
</nav>

<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-bg"></div><div class="hero-grid"></div>
  <div class="hero-number">01</div>
  <div class="hero-content">
    <h1>PROTECT<br>YOUR<br>LEGS</h1>
    <p class="hero-sub">Mini legghlífar hannaðar fyrir hreyfingu. Léttar, þægilegar og í þrennum stærðum.</p>
    <a href="#vorur" class="btn-primary">Skoða vörur</a>
  </div>
  <div class="scroll-hint">Fletta niður</div>
</section>

<section id="vorur">
  <div class="section-label">Vörulisti</div>
  <h2>MINI<br>LEGGHLÍFAR</h2>
  <div class="color-tabs">
    <button class="color-tab blue-tab active" id="tab-blue" onclick="setColor('blue')">
      <span class="color-dot blue"></span> Bláar / Hvítar
    </button>
    <button class="color-tab pink-tab" id="tab-pink" onclick="setColor('pink')">
      <span class="color-dot pink"></span> Bleikjurauðar / Hvítar
    </button>
  </div>
  <div class="product-grid">
    <div class="product-card fade-in">
      <div class="product-img">
        <div class="product-tag">S</div>
        <img id="img-s" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Propads Mini S">
      </div>
      <div class="product-info">
        <div class="product-name">Propads Mini — S</div>
        <div class="product-desc">Minnsta stærðin. Fullkomin fyrir ungar leikmenn og smærri einstaklinga.</div>
        <div class="product-footer">
          <div class="price">4.990 kr</div>
          <button class="add-btn" onclick="addToCart('S')">+ Karfa</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="product-card fade-in" style="transition-delay:0.1s">
      <div class="product-img">
        <div class="product-tag" style="background:white;color:black;">Mest seld</div>
        <img id="img-m" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Propads Mini M">
      </div>
      <div class="product-info">
        <div class="product-name">Propads Mini — M</div>
        <div class="product-desc">Miðstærðin. Hentar flestum fullorðnum leikmönnum og unglingum.</div>
        <div class="product-footer">
          <div class="price">4.990 kr</div>
          <button class="add-btn" onclick="addToCart('M')">+ Karfa</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="product-card fade-in" style="transition-delay:0.2s">
      <div class="product-img">
        <div class="product-tag">L</div>
        <img id="img-l" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Propads Mini L">
      </div>
      <div class="product-info">
        <div class="product-name">Propads Mini — L</div>
        <div class="product-desc">Stærsta stærðin. Fyrir stóra einstaklinga og þá sem vilja meiri hlíf.</div>
        <div class="product-footer">
          <div class="price">4.990 kr</div>
          <button class="add-btn" onclick="addToCart('L')">+ Karfa</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="treystir">
  <div class="section-label">Leikmenn</div>
  <h2>TREYSTIR<br>PROPADS</h2>
  <div class="athletes-intro"><p>Stærstu fótboltamenn landsins velja Propads. Léttar, þægilegar og í takt við hvernig leikurinn er spilaður í dag.</p></div>
  <div class="athletes-grid">
    <div class="athlete-card fade-in">
      <div class="athlete-placeholder"><div class="athlete-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none"><circle cx="24" cy="16" r="10" stroke="white" stroke-width="2"/><path d="M4 44c0-11 9-20 20-20s20 9 20 20" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg></div><span class="athlete-hint">Bættu mynd hér</span></div>
      <div class="athlete-info"><div class="athlete-name">Nafn Leikmanns</div><div class="athlete-club">Félag · Land</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="athlete-card fade-in" style="transition-delay:0.1s">
      <div class="athlete-placeholder"><div class="athlete-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none"><circle cx="24" cy="16" r="10" stroke="white" stroke-width="2"/><path d="M4 44c0-11 9-20 20-20s20 9 20 20" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg></div><span class="athlete-hint">Bættu mynd hér</span></div>
      <div class="athlete-info"><div class="athlete-name">Nafn Leikmanns</div><div class="athlete-club">Félag · Land</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="athlete-card fade-in" style="transition-delay:0.2s">
      <div class="athlete-placeholder"><div class="athlete-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none"><circle cx="24" cy="16" r="10" stroke="white" stroke-width="2"/><path d="M4 44c0-11 9-20 20-20s20 9 20 20" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg></div><span class="athlete-hint">Bættu mynd hér</span></div>
      <div class="athlete-info"><div class="athlete-name">Nafn Leikmanns</div><div class="athlete-club">Félag · Land</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="quote-grid">
    <div class="quote-card"><div class="quote-mark">"</div><div class="quote-text">Bættu tilvitnun frá leikmann hér.</div><div class="quote-author">— Nafn · Félag</div></div>
    <div class="quote-card"><div class="quote-mark">"</div><div class="quote-text">Önnur tilvitun frá öðrum leikmann.</div><div class="quote-author">— Nafn · Félag</div></div>
    <div class="quote-card"><div class="quote-mark">"</div><div class="quote-text">Þriðja tilvitunin — stutt og slagkræf.</div><div class="quote-author">— Nafn · Félag</div></div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="um-okkur">
  <div class="section-label">Um okkur</div>
  <div class="about-grid">
    <img class="about-img" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Propads legghlífar">
    <div class="about-text fade-in">
      <h2>OKKAR<br>SAGA</h2>
      <p>Propads byrjaði sem hugmynd meðal íþróttamanna sem vildu betri hlíf — léttari, þægilegri og án þess að vera í veginum.</p>
      <p>Mini legghlífar okkar eru hannaðar fyrir þá sem vilja vernd án þyngdar. Þrjár stærðir til að passa alla.</p>
      <div class="stats">
        <div><div class="stat-num">3</div><div class="stat-label">Stærðir</div></div>
        <div><div class="stat-num">100%</div><div class="stat-label">Gæði</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="pantanir">
  <div class="section-label">Samband</div>
  <div class="contact-grid">
    <div class="contact-info fade-in">
      <h2>HAFA<br>SAMBAND</h2>
      <p>Spurningar um vörur, stærðir eða pantanir? Við svörum fljótt.</p>
      <div class="contact-links">
        <a href="https://instagram.com/propads" class="contact-link"><div class="contact-icon">📷</div>@propads á Instagram</a>
        <a href="mailto:propads@gmail.com" class="contact-link"><div class="contact-icon">✉</div>propads@gmail.com</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="fade-in">
      <div class="form-group"><label>Nafn</label><input type="text" placeholder="Nafn þitt"></div>
      <div class="form-group"><label>Netfang</label><input type="email" placeholder="netfang@gmail.com"></div>
      <div class="form-group"><label>Skilaboð</label><textarea placeholder="Hvernig getum við hjálpað þér?"></textarea></div>
      <button class="btn-primary" style="width:100%;text-align:center;">Senda skilaboð</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<footer>
  <div class="footer-logo">Propads</div>
  <div class="footer-text">© 2025 Propads · Öll réttindi áskilin</div>
</footer>

<!-- KARFA DRAWER -->
<div class="cart-overlay" id="cartOverlay" onclick="closeCart()"></div>
<div class="cart-drawer" id="cartDrawer">
  <div class="cart-head">
    <div class="cart-title">KARFA</div>
    <button class="cart-x" onclick="closeCart()">✕</button>
  </div>
  <div class="cart-body" id="cartBody">
    <div class="cart-empty-msg">Karfan þín er tóm</div>
  </div>
  <div class="cart-foot">
    <div class="cart-subtotal">
      <span class="cart-subtotal-label">Samtals</span>
      <span class="cart-subtotal-val" id="cartTotal">0 kr</span>
    </div>
    <div id="paypal-btn-container"></div>
    <div class="checkout-note">PayPal · Kredit/Debetkort · Öruggar greiðslur</div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="toast" id="toast"></div>

<script src="https://www.paypal.com/sdk/js?client-id=AQHtT_JiweUysxBna-IltWAuPqBBOtdQCPd36S0H3TLmIvhXP_OfYqW6F-xnp-5-dAZkrFA5k1piAKhV&currency=ISK&intent=capture"></script>
<script>
const BLUE_SRC='data:image/jpeg;base64,';
const PINK_SRC='data:image/jpeg;base64,';
let activeColor='blue';
let activeColorLabel='Bláar/Hvítar';
let cart=[];
let paypalRendered=false;

function setColor(c){
  activeColor=c;
  activeColorLabel=c==='blue'?'Bláar/Hvítar':'Bleikjurauðar/Hvítar';
  const src=c==='blue'?BLUE_SRC:PINK_SRC;
  ['img-s','img-m','img-l'].forEach(id=>document.getElementById(id).src=src);
  document.getElementById('tab-blue').classList.toggle('active',c==='blue');
  document.getElementById('tab-pink').classList.toggle('active',c==='pink');
}

function addToCart(size){
  const key=activeColor+'-'+size;
  const ex=cart.find(i=>i.key===key);
  if(ex){ex.qty++;}
  else{cart.push({key,size,color:activeColor,colorLabel:activeColorLabel,price:4990,qty:1});}
  renderCart();
  showToast('Propads '+size+' bætt í körfu');
  openCart();
}

function changeQty(key,delta){
  const item=cart.find(i=>i.key===key);
  if(!item)return;
  item.qty+=delta;
  if(item.qty<=0)cart=cart.filter(i=>i.key!==key);
  renderCart();
}

function renderCart(){
  const count=cart.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.qty,0);
  const total=cart.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.price*i.qty,0);
  document.getElementById('cartBadge').textContent=count;
  document.getElementById('cartTotal').textContent=total.toLocaleString('is-IS')+' kr';
  const body=document.getElementById('cartBody');
  if(!cart.length){
    body.innerHTML='<div class="cart-empty-msg">Karfan þín er tóm</div>';
    return;
  }
  body.innerHTML=cart.map(item=>`
    <div class="cart-item">
      <div class="cart-item-img"><img src="${item.color==='blue'?BLUE_SRC:PINK_SRC}" alt=""></div>
      <div class="cart-item-info">
        <div class="cart-item-name">Propads Mini — ${item.size}</div>
        <div class="cart-item-meta">${item.colorLabel}</div>
        <div class="cart-item-price">${(item.price*item.qty).toLocaleString('is-IS')} kr</div>
        <div class="cart-item-controls">
          <button class="qty-btn" onclick="changeQty('${item.key}',-1)">−</button>
          <span class="qty-num">${item.qty}</span>
          <button class="qty-btn" onclick="changeQty('${item.key}',1)">+</button>
          <button class="remove-btn" onclick="changeQty('${item.key}',-${item.qty})">Fjarlægja</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  `).join('');
  renderPayPalBtn();
}

function renderPayPalBtn(){
  if(paypalRendered)return;
  if(!cart.length)return;
  paypalRendered=true;
  document.getElementById('paypal-btn-container').innerHTML='';
  paypal.Buttons({
    style:{layout:'vertical',color:'black',shape:'rect',label:'pay'},
    createOrder:function(data,actions){
      return actions.order.create({
        purchase_units:[{
          amount:{
            value:(cart.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.price*i.qty,0)).toString(),
            currency_code:'ISK',
            breakdown:{
              item_total:{value:(cart.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.price*i.qty,0)).toString(),currency_code:'ISK'}
            }
          },
          items:cart.map(item=>({
            name:'Propads Mini '+item.size+' ('+item.colorLabel+')',
            unit_amount:{value:item.price.toString(),currency_code:'ISK'},
            quantity:item.qty.toString()
          }))
        }]
      });
    },
    onApprove:function(data,actions){
      return actions.order.capture().then(function(){
        cart=[];
        paypalRendered=false;
        renderCart();
        closeCart();
        showToast('Greiðsla tókst — takk!');
      });
    },
    onError:function(err){
      showToast('Villa við greiðslu — reyndu aftur');
    }
  }).render('#paypal-btn-container');
}

function openCart(){
  document.getElementById('cartOverlay').classList.add('open');
  document.getElementById('cartDrawer').classList.add('open');
  if(cart.length)renderPayPalBtn();
}
function closeCart(){
  document.getElementById('cartOverlay').classList.remove('open');
  document.getElementById('cartDrawer').classList.remove('open');
}
function showToast(msg){
  const t=document.getElementById('toast');
  t.textContent=msg;t.classList.add('show');
  setTimeout(()=>t.classList.remove('show'),2500);
}

const cursor=document.getElementById('cursor');
document.addEventListener('mousemove',e=>{cursor.style.left=e.clientX+'px';cursor.style.top=e.clientY+'px';});
document.querySelectorAll('button,a,.product-card,.athlete-card').forEach(el=>{
  el.addEventListener('mouseenter',()=>cursor.classList.add('big'));
  el.addEventListener('mouseleave',()=>cursor.classList.remove('big'));
});

const obs=new IntersectionObserver(es=>es.forEach(e=>{if(e.isIntersecting)e.target.classList.add('visible');}),{threshold:0.1});
document.querySelectorAll('.fade-in').forEach(el=>obs.observe(el));
</script>
</body>
</html>
